ARKW.forward_return_basis: 60% BTC + 40% ETH long-run CAGR × 1.10 (equity-beta premium), minus expenses

ARKF.forward_return_basis: 60% BTC + 40% ETH long-run CAGR × 1.10 (equity-beta premium), minus expenses

IDOG.forward_return_basis: DOGE-USD long-run CAGR (66.6%) — per-coin (no uniform haircut), minus expenses

ILTC.forward_return_basis: LTC-USD long-run CAGR (30.2%) — per-coin (no uniform haircut), minus expenses

FSOLE.forward_return_basis: SOL-USD long-run CAGR (109.5%) — per-coin (no uniform haircut), minus expenses

EZDG.forward_return_basis: DOGE-USD long-run CAGR (66.6%) — per-coin (no uniform haircut), minus expenses

VXRP2.forward_return_basis: XRP-USD long-run CAGR (24.6%) — per-coin (no uniform haircut), minus expenses

VLTC.forward_return_basis: LTC-USD long-run CAGR (30.2%) — per-coin (no uniform haircut), minus expenses

ETHD.forward_return_basis: ETH-USD 10yr CAGR (25.2%) × 1.10 (vol-decay-adjusted 2x — realized cumulative return for 2x crypto products tracks ~1× spot in volatile regimes, not 2×), minus expenses

BITT.forward_return_basis: BTC-USD 10yr CAGR (67.3%) × 1.10 (vol-decay-adjusted 2x — realized cumulative return for 2x crypto products tracks ~1× spot in volatile regimes, not 2×), minus expenses

ETHL.forward_return_basis: ETH-USD 10yr CAGR (25.2%) × 1.10 (vol-decay-adjusted 2x — realized cumulative return for 2x crypto products tracks ~1× spot in volatile regimes, not 2×), minus expenses

DEFIQ.forward_return_basis: 60% BTC + 40% ETH long-run CAGR × 1.10 (equity-beta premium), minus expenses

CBOM.forward_return_basis: BTC-USD 10yr CAGR (67.3%) × 0.40 (defined-outcome upside cap + buffer floor), minus expenses. Real payoff is capped by the series outcome period — this is the annualized average across cap hits and flat periods.

CBOG.forward_return_basis: BTC-USD 10yr CAGR (67.3%) × 0.40 (defined-outcome upside cap + buffer floor), minus expenses. Real payoff is capped by the series outcome period — this is the annualized average across cap hits and flat periods.

CBOD.forward_return_basis: BTC-USD 10yr CAGR (67.3%) × 0.40 (defined-outcome upside cap + buffer floor), minus expenses. Real payoff is capped by the series outcome period — this is the annualized average across cap hits and flat periods.

FTHR.forward_return_basis: 60% BTC + 40% ETH long-run CAGR × 1.10 (equity-beta premium), minus expenses

STKE.forward_return_basis: SOL-USD long-run CAGR (109.5%) — per-coin (no uniform haircut), minus expenses

MSSL.forward_return_basis: SOL-USD long-run CAGR (109.5%) — per-coin (no uniform haircut), minus expenses
